title: cynanchum pachycladon
intro: Cynanchum pachycladon, also known as the New Zealand confederate or the native confederate, is a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family. Traditionally, Cynanchum pachycladon has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing digestive issues. Cynanchum pachycladon is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed for its medicinal and health benefits.
